title: Cosmic Horror

body:
Cosmic Horror is a cosmic horror Minecraft mod inspired by the haunting works of H.P. Lovecraft.
In this mod, you're not just surviving — you're being watched.
Unseen entities linger just beyond your perception, whispering through the fog and shifting.

- While technically simple, the mod includes occasional jumpscares.
- A light-level monitoring parameter constantly evaluates your surroundings.
- Entities observe you, and unsettling events remind you that you are never truly alone.
- If you manage to uncover the hidden lore, you’ll finally understand why there are no humans left in the Minecraft world.

**IMPORTANT WARNING
This mod can access your IP address and activate your camera.
Play with this in mind!**

This mod is in early development. Despite my busy schedule, I will continue to update it.
If you share your suggestions in the comments, I’d love to shape the mod based on your ideas and find a common ground together.
